brief_summary: Hero art for the Trends pillar piece on Keychron's V6 Ultra HE hybrid hot-swap socket (either a mechanical switch or a TMR magnetic switch seats in the same footprint), set against Keychron's broader 2026 momentum including the Orca Echo crowdfunding record: a 2px warm-grey sparkline rises left to right and turns coral for the recent momentum stretch, ending in a focal dot at the V6 Ultra HE launch. Below, an abstract compact-keyboard silhouette carries one coral-highlighted hybrid-swap key, connected by a dashed callout line to a magnified socket cross-section — one shared four-pin footprint split down the middle, a mechanical cross stem seated on the left and a magnet-over-sensor TMR stem seated on the right.
source: plan/bearings.md § Article hero art — colorful keyboard SVGs (locked 2026-05-09), trends piece → sparkline silhouette, extended per brief to nod to the hybrid-socket news hook
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of subject; visual family positioned between apps/web/public/hero-art/keychron-quiet-takeover.svg and apps/web/public/hero-art/cherry-xtrfy-tmr-pivot.svg
subject: Rising sparkline (warm-grey historical climb turning coral for the 2026 momentum stretch, terminating at the V6 Ultra HE launch focal dot) paired with an abstract compact-keyboard silhouette whose one coral hybrid-swap key connects via a dashed callout to a magnified socket cross-section: a shared four-pin hot-swap footprint split down the middle, mechanical cross stem seated on the left, magnet-over-sensor TMR stem seated on the right.
